installCommand: bash -lc 'if [ -d apps/web ]; then cd apps/web; else cd ../../apps/web; fi; npm install'
buildCommand: bash -lc 'root=$(pwd); if [ -d apps/web ]; then web=$(cd apps/web && pwd); else web=$(cd ../../apps/web && pwd); fi; cd "$web"; npm run build; if [ "$web/dist" != "$root/apps/web/dist" ]; then mkdir -p "$root/apps/web"; rm -rf "$root/apps/web/dist"; cp -R "$web/dist" "$root/apps/web/dist"; fi'
